Try it NOW.](https://www.siliconflow.com/models/minimax-m2-1) Transparent Pricing High-performance inference at competitive prices. Pay only for what you use with no hidden fees or commitments. 15](https://framerusercontent.com/images/HhppGfXDCZaZuA4L05zBVnR98rQ.png?width=4257&height=1949) Serverless Pricing Flexible token pricing, high usage limits, and postpaid billing—plus $1 in free credits to get you started! ![Image 16](https://framerusercontent.com/images/pEYdWzG3TPC3GmpZfJ53qhixCAQ.svg?width=48&height=48) DeepSeek DeepSeek released the first open‑weight model and has gained global attention for building highly capable, cost‑efficient LLMs. Models such as DeepSeek‑V3.2 and DeepSeek‑R1 are competitive with top international models, delivering remarkable performance in reasoning, coding, and mathematical problem‑solving. Model Name Context Length Input Cached Input Output Actions DeepSeek-V4-Flash 1049K $ 0.14 $ 0.028 $ 0.28 [Details](https://www.siliconflow.com/models/deepseek-v4-flash) DeepSeek-V4-Pro 1049K $ 1.74 $ 0.145 $ 3.48 [Details](https://www.siliconflow.com/models/deepseek-v4-pro) DeepSeek-V3.2 164K $ 0.27 $ 0.135 $ 0.42 [Details](https://www.siliconflow.com/models/deepseek-v3-2) DeepSeek-V3.2-Exp 164K $ 0.27 $ 0.41 [Details](https://www.siliconflow.com/models/deepseek-v3-2-exp) DeepSeek-V3.1-Terminus 164K $ 0.27 $ 1 [Details](https://www.siliconflow.com/models/deepseek-v3-1-terminus) Load More Prices shown are per 1 million tokens. ![Image 17](https://framerusercontent.com/images/YXUvwoRV8I3oDKN2ZJQVicQyn8E.png?width=200&height=200) Qwen Open-source AI model family built by Alibaba Cloud, ranging from sub-1B to 480B+ parameters, designed to scale to any use case, from deep reasoning and math to autonomous coding. Model Name Context Length Input Cached Input Output Actions Qwen3-VL-32B-Instruct 262K $ 0.2 $ 0.6 [Details](https://www.siliconflow.com/models/qwen3-vl-32b-instruct) Qwen3-VL-32B-Thinking 262K $ 0.2 $ 1.5 [Details](https://www.siliconflow.com/models/qwen3-vl-32b-thinking) Qwen3-VL-8B-Instruct 262K $ 0.18 $ 0.68 [Details](https://www.siliconflow.com/models/qwen3-vl-8b-instruct) Qwen3-VL-30B-A3B-Instruct 262K $ 0.29 $ 1 [Details](https://www.siliconflow.com/models/qwen3-vl-30b-a3b-instruct) Qwen3-VL-30B-A3B-Thinking 262K $ 0.29 $ 1 [Details](https://www.siliconflow.com/models/qwen3-vl-30b-a3b-thinking) Load More Prices shown are per 1 million tokens. ![Image 18](https://framerusercontent.com/images/NxrOUrj3GnEsWju2DhB4PfjBVrY.png?width=200&height=200) Z.ai Zhipu AI builds the ChatGLM family of LLMs, develops LLMs as Agents. The latest model, GLM-4.7, delivers frontier-level performance in coding, creative writing, and role-play scenarios. Model Name Context Length Input Cached Input Output Actions GLM-5.1 205K $ 1.4 $ 0.26 $ 4.4 [Details](https://www.siliconflow.com/models/glm-5-1) GLM-5 205K $ 0.95 $ 0.2 $ 2.55 [Details](https://www.siliconflow.com/models/glm-5) GLM-4.7 205K $ 0.42 $ 0.11 $ 2.2 [Details](https://www.siliconflow.com/models/glm-4-7) GLM-4.6V 131K $ 0.3 $ 0.9 [Details](https://www.siliconflow.com/models/glm-4-6v) GLM-4.6 205K $ 0.39 $ 1.9 [Details](https://www.siliconflow.com/models/glm-4-6) Load More Prices shown are per 1 million tokens. ![Image 19](https://framerusercontent.com/images/EWOn1OXFdxC9nCqiWn4XVhEdo.png?width=512&height=512) Moonshot AI Moonshot AI stands out for breakthroughs in long-context language models. Its flagship product, Kimi, is especially well suited for research, legal work, and complex information synthesis. The latest release, Kimi K2 Thinking, is a state-of-the-art thinking agent with deep reasoning and tool orchestration. Model Name Context Length Input Cached Input Output Actions Kimi-K2-Instruct 131K $ 0.58 $ 2.29 [Details](https://www.siliconflow.com/models/kimi-k2-instruct) Kimi-K2-Instruct-0905 262K $ 0.4 $ 2 [Details](https://www.siliconflow.com/models/kimi-k2-instruct-0905) Kimi-K2.5 262K $ 0.23 $ 0.07 $ 3.0 [Details](https://www.siliconflow.com/models/kimi-k2-5) Kimi-K2.6 262K $ 0.95 $ 0.16 $ 4.0 [Details](https://www.siliconflow.com/models/kimi-k2-6) Prices shown are per 1 million tokens. ![Image 20](https://framerusercontent.com/images/a9DCl9wBeXOGqzKwJDRzAqorqyY.jpeg?width=200&height=200) MiniMaxAI Specialized in multimodal capabilities, MiniMax develops advanced models that seamlessly integrate text, voice, and vision, with notable achievements in natural-sounding text-to-speech and voice cloning. Model Name Context Length Input Cached Input Output Actions MiniMax-M2.5 197K $ 0.3 $ 0.03 $ 1.2 [Details](https://www.siliconflow.com/models/minimax-m2-5) Prices shown are per 1 million tokens. ![Image 21](https://framerusercontent.com/images/wEPjGLrT6XgMLPf8SMVlwoxLuw.svg?width=256&height=260) OpenAI OpenAI is a pioneering AI research organization that helped spark today's generative AI revolution. Its GPT series brought LLMs into the mainstream and is currently led by GPT-5.2 and o3, which set industry benchmarks for natural language understanding, generation, and reasoning. Model Name Context Length Input Cached Input Output Actions gpt-oss-120b 131K $ 0.05 $ 0.45 [Details](https://www.siliconflow.com/models/gpt-oss-120b) gpt-oss-20b 131K $ 0.04 $ 0.18 [Details](https://www.siliconflow.com/models/gpt-oss-20b) Prices shown are per 1 million tokens. Image Generation Generate high-quality images from text prompts with our state-of-the-art image generation models. Model Name Price (/image) Actions FLUX 1.1 [pro] $ 0.04 [Details](https://www.siliconflow.com/models/flux-1-1-pro) FLUX 1.1 [pro] Ultra $ 0.06 [Details](https://www.siliconflow.com/models/flux-1-1-pro-ultra) FLUX.1 Kontext [max] $ 0.08 [Details](https://www.siliconflow.com/models/flux-1-kontext-max) FLUX.1 Kontext [pro] $ 0.04 [Details](https://www.siliconflow.com/models/flux-1-kontext-pro) FLUX.1-dev $ 0.014 [Details](https://www.siliconflow.com/models/flux-1-dev) Load More Prices shown are per image generated or edited. Video Generation Create dynamic videos from text descriptions with our cutting-edge video generation models. Model Name Price (/video) Actions Wan2.2-I2V-A14B $ 0.29 [Details](https://www.siliconflow.com/models/wan2-2-i2v-a14b) Wan2.2-T2V-A14B $ 0.29 [Details](https://www.siliconflow.com/models/wan2-2-t2v-a14b) Prices shown are per video generated. Audio Models Process and generate audio with our high-quality speech recognition and synthesis models. Model Name Output (/M UTF-8 bytes) Actions Fish-Speech-1.5 $ 15 [Details](https://www.siliconflow.com/models/fish-speech-1-5) FunAudioLLM/CosyVoice2-0.5B $ 7.15 [Details](https://www.siliconflow.com/models/funaudiollm-cosyvoice2-0-5b) IndexTTS-2 $ 7.15 [Details](https://www.siliconflow.com/models/indextts-2) Prices for transcription and translation are per minute of audio. Text-to-Speech prices are per 1,000 characters. ![Image 22](https://framerusercontent.com/images/qKalMUib10FsPLRR6uJVORvihHE.png?width=3024&height=1552) Frequently Asked Questions How does billing work? You're billed based on your usage. For chat models, you're charged per token for both input and output. For image, video, and audio models, pricing varies based on the specific task and output quality. Are there any minimum commitments? No, there are no minimum commitments. You only pay for what you use, and you can start with $1 in free credits. Can I set spending limits? Yes, you can set monthly spending limits in your account dashboard to control costs and prevent unexpected charges. Do you offer volume discounts? Yes, we offer volume discounts for high-usage customers. If your usage is substantial, please contact our sales team who can create a custom pricing plan tailored to your needs. How do I get started? Sign up for an account, get your API key, and start using our models right away. We provide comprehensive documentation and code examples to help you integrate quickly. Ready to accelerate your AI development? [Get Started for Free](https://cloud.siliconflow.com/) ![Image 23](https://framerusercontent.com/images/Ptnckcmo6MTKRJNca38iwcarG2I.png?lossless=1&width=2229&height=2229) [](https://www.siliconflow.com/) PAGES [Home](https://www.siliconflow.com/) [Models](https://www.siliconflow.com/models) [Products](https://www.siliconflow.com/products) [Docs](https://docs.siliconflow.com/) [Pricing](https://www.siliconflow.com/pricing) [Blog](https://www.siliconflow.com/blog) [About](https://www.siliconflow.com/about) [Contact](https://www.siliconflow.com/contact) MODELS [Image](https://www.siliconflow.com/models/image) [Video](https://www.siliconflow.com/models/video) [LLM](https://www.siliconflow.com/models/llm) [Audio](https://www.siliconflow.com/models/audio) PRODUCTS [Overview](https://www.siliconflow.com/products#overview) [Inference](https://www.siliconflow.com/products#inference) [Fine-tuning](https://www.siliconflow.com/products#fine-tuning) [Reserved GPUs](https://www.siliconflow.com/products#reserved-gpus) Subscribe for updates Subscribe [](https://x.com/SiliconFlowAI) [](https://www.linkedin.com/company/siliconflow) [](https://discord.com/invite/7Ey3dVNFpT) [](https://medium.com/@siliconflowai) ©2025 SiliconFlow [Terms](https://docs.siliconflow.com/en/legals/terms-of-service) · [Privacy](https://docs.siliconflow.com/en/legals/privacy-policy)
